headlines.title: Zelensky proposes face-to-face talks in open letter to Putin
headlines.summary: Ukraine's president tells the Russian leader that only 'direct engagement' between the two countries could end the war, with the US focused on Iran.

headlines.title: Ukraine strikes cargo ships and admits Romania drone blast
headlines.summary: Ukraine says it struck five ships carrying illegal cargo in the Sea of Azov and in coastal waters of Russian-occupied territories.

headlines.title: Israel and Lebanon agree to full ceasefire, but Hezbollah rejects it
headlines.summary: Israel and Lebanon agreed to a full ceasefire contingent on Hezbollah halting attacks and withdrawing operatives from south of the Litani River. Hezbollah has rejected the agreement.

headlines.title: Xi Jinping to meet Kim Jong Un in rare visit to North Korea
headlines.summary: China's president Xi Jinping will meet Kim Jong Un next week in his first visit to North Korea in nearly seven years, following recent meetings with US and Russian leaders.

headlines.title: Uncertainty surrounds US-Iran talks as regional tensions continue
headlines.summary: The US State Department reminded Americans throughout the Middle East of the continued need for caution as the US and Iran continue to trade attacks despite assertions the war is 'over'.

headlines.title: Nearly 50 people die of thirst in Sahara desert after lorry breaks down
headlines.summary: Only two survived after trekking more than 50km across the desert to alert authorities when their vehicle broke down in the Sahara.

headlines.title: US actor James Handy stabbed to death, girlfriend's son arrested
headlines.summary: James Handy, 81, known for roles in films including Jumanji and Top Gun: Maverick, was killed. A suspect has been arrested.

headlines.title: China cracks down on soft porn, violence in viral micro dramas
headlines.summary: Micro dramas have surged in popularity but drawn criticism for often sensationalist content. Chinese regulators are now taking action.

headlines.title: Mangrove forests are healing after decades of human destruction
headlines.summary: Swampy mangrove forests are staging a surprise comeback - good news for coastal communities and the climate.

headlines.title: Fury in France after child murder suspect's criminal record released
headlines.summary: A man suspected of murdering an 11-year-old girl had previously been identified as a potential child molester, records show.
